match_nodes.description: CTID Control Framework to ATT&CK Mapping Methodology: systematic process for mapping security control frameworks (NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, etc.) to ATT&CK techniques. Developed by the Center for Threat-Informed Defense (CTID).
CTID Technology Platform Capability to ATT&CK Methodology: process for mapping security capabilities of technology platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP) to ATT&CK techniques they can detect or mitigate.
